author: @speedyd8150
text:
I'll never forget getting sentenced to 364 days in county jail because I overdosed and the cops found a needle and a cotton with trace amounts of heroin in the needle cap on me after someone called 911 to save my life. 

A few weeks after I was sentenced a 22 year old man came into the pod and he was sentenced to 6 months in county jail and was allowed to leave the jail 10 hours a day, 5 days a week for work release. He admitted he was a sex offender and someone had their wife look him up and he was charged with "having sexual relations with someone under the age of 12". 

My judge told me that he was doing me a favor by not sentencing me to 365 days because I would go to prison and have a prison number (I had a felony either way). 

Yet this 22 year old man had "sexual relations" with a child and even though he was sentenced to half my time, he only did about 1/4 of that because they allowed him to leave the jail 5 days a week. All he did was sleep there basically. 

I was guilty as hell because I was a junkie in 2013 and the day after I got out, I looked this mans name up and sure enough everyone was right. 

Why are addicts that didn't hurt anyone except themselves getting the max sentences which men/women that hurt children get basically nothing? 

There's a reason for it and I want to know why they're getting let off so easy.

author: @Sonicstillpoint83
text: Twenty years ago, Florida told me parents would not want cameras in classrooms and would have no interest in seeing or reviewing what their children did every day when I tried to get hired as a teacher. They said being blind meant no teaching job for me because removing bullies from a classroom would not be allowed. They claimed teachers who can see can somehow prevent bullying with their eyes. It warms my heart to know that modern education now supports teaching children proper mattress push-up technique, because I would have been fired long ago for putting local administrators on camera and asking them about this.

These kinds of people should NOT be allowed in Any kind of Gov't position. NO KIDS, let alone "queer" kids, NEED access to "That kind of Education".  NO KIDS!!! What's the matter with this guy. It's the PARENT'S responsibility as to what to tell their kids about the Birds and the Bees. NOT the School, NOT the Gov't, NOT your neighbor---NO ONE BUT the Parents!
